stocks.impact_theory: GameStop reported its most profitable year ever with $418M turnaround, alongside a major 13F filing showing Creek Drive Management's $20M long position (900k shares + calls). This counters dilution fears, boosts retail sentiment reminiscent of 2021 squeeze. Economic implications: Signals retail investor revival amid market volatility. Market psychology: FOMO drives apes back. Historical parallels: 2021 MOASS hype. Analogies: Like Bitcoin halving sparking rallies; phoenix rising from ashes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts show explosive positive sentiment (high likes/reposts on profitability/13F), web news on earnings beat. Peace in Middle East reduces risk-off, favoring meme stocks. High volume suggests momentum continuation.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 15-20% gains in 1-2 weeks on squeeze potential; target $40.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or cover; short risks gamma ramp.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Dilution announcements, broader market crash, fading hype.

stocks.justification: Strong X buzz, confirmed news, historical precedent for rapid moves.

stocks.impact_theory: Arm unveiled new AI CPU amid massive demand signals; up 11.5% noted. Economic: Accelerates AI chip race, boosts semi sector. Psychology: Reinforces AI narrative dominance. Parallels: NVDA post-ChatGPT surge. Analogies: Fuel to AI rocket engine; like Intel in PC boom.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web mentions as top mover, X posts highlight AI strength despite memory dips. Geopolitical de-escalation supports tech risk-on.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Broader semi correction, competition from AMD/INTC.

stocks.justification: Clear product news, but dependent on AI sector momentum.

stocks.impact_theory: META launches aggressive stock options for execs (needs $9T mcap), Zuckerberg on Trump's AI panel with NVDA/ORCL founders. Implications: Aligns mgmt with growth, policy tailwinds. Psychology: Validates META's AI pivot. Parallels: FAANG rallies on policy. Analogies: Carrot for racehorse; VIP pass to AI policy table.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment positive on advisory/payouts, ties into Trump peace rally.

stocks.impact_theory: Merck to acquire Terns Pharmaceuticals, expanding pipeline. Implications: Bolsters pharma M&A in defensive sector. Psychology: Safe haven amid volatility. Parallels: PFE COVID deals. Analogies: Acquiring treasure map; armor upgrade in battle.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Bloomberg podcast highlights as mover; steady pharma demand.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil falls on Trump's Iran peace push/ceasefire hopes, hurting energy. Implications: Lower input costs but profit squeeze for majors. Psychology: Risk-off unwind hits commodities. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine de-escalation dips. Analogies: Deflating balloon; rug pull from war premium.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Bloomberg markets wrap notes oil drop, energy lags rally; X implies rotation out.

stocks.justification: Direct tie to headline risk resolution.
